notes: Td-WTe2 has no computed dielectric data in Materials Project (mp-1019717 is the Td phase but lacks dielectric).
These values are estimated from published DFT+HSE06/GW calculations:
Soluyanov et al., Nature 527, 495 (2015) — band structure
Ali et al., Nature 514, 205 (2014) — crystal structure
Approximate static dielectric from LDA+scissor correction for similar TMDs.
Td phase is orthorhombic; treated as uniaxial for Lifshitz calc with
eps_par  = eps_zz = 8.80 (c-axis, along Casimir gap normal)
